commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
Ispravi ReferenceError: msgLower mora biti definiran PRIJE gastro pre-gen bloka

msgLower korišten u gastro pre-gen (linija ~360) ali definiran tek u okolica bloku
(linija ~461) — temporal dead zone → ReferenceError → JSON parse error u frontendu.

Fix: premjesti 'const msgLower = message.toLowerCase()' na sam početak
pre-gen sekcije (prije dogadanja bloka), ukloni duplu definiciju u okolica bloku.

commit.message:
v0.5.0: Internet outage resilience, import cost accounting, and true profit tracking

Add stale tariff data detection with Self Use fallback when internet drops,
import cost calculation from both settlement meter data and real-time HA
snapshots, and charging opportunity cost estimation for solar-to-battery
forgone revenue. 135 tests passing.

Phase 1: Tariff/HA freshness checks, INSUFFICIENT_DATA → Self Use fallback,
health MQTT sensors (tariff_age, tariff_status, ha_state_age, ha_state_status).

Phase 2: Import cost from settlement data (meter × tariff join), real-time
estimated import cost via energy balance (load + battery_charge - pv -
battery_discharge), new MQTT sensors for import cost, net revenue, true profit.

Phase 3: Charging opportunity cost heuristic — min(battery_charge, pv) ×
export_rate tracks forgone export revenue when solar charges the battery.

so the LLM produces a natural morning briefing without tool calls.

* quick

* Fix CodeRabbit review comments

- Remove unnecessary `as JobStatus` type assertions (rule #16)
- Remove unused JobStatus import from members route

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: self-heal missing server row on startup instead of crashing

The app previously crashed with process.exit(1) if its server row was
missing from app.servers, requiring manual `bun run db:seed`. Now it
upserts the row automatically using data from server-config.json.

Also adds PostgREST schema cache reload (NOTIFY pgrst) after db:seed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: merge type export to satisfy Biome lint rule

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review comments

- Tighten context retention E2E test to inject a random ReasonId per run
  instead of letting the model choose (prevents false positives)
- Fix incomplete env group references in alive-toml-v1.md proposal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: make Supabase errors retryable in ensureServerRow, remove dead checkServerRow

ensureServerRowOnce() now throws on Supabase errors instead of returning
{ ok: false }, so transient failures (rate limits, timeouts, 5xx) are
caught by the retry loop with exponential backoff.

Removed checkServerRow() — zero callers existed, and it passed empty
serverIp/hostname that would violate NOT NULL constraints.

Also includes template hostname consolidation: split hostname into
internalHostname + subdomain to support multi-server deployments
without hardcoded domains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

constitution v1.2.0: Mandate GitHub Release for every version bump

The release tag is the trigger for all downstream distribution
(PyPI, container registries). Without it, merged code sits
undistributed — silently violating distribution requirements.

commit.message:
fix: swap direction values in egg layout to match SplitContainer convention

SplitContainer interprets direction as divider orientation (vertical = left/right,
horizontal = top/bottom). Eggs had it inverted — sidebar/git were stacking
top/bottom instead of left/right. Fixes code-default and turtle-draw.

Add SOL amount commit step between gallery and lock-in

portraits, user chooses how much SOL to lock (preset buttons
0.5/1/2/5/10 + custom input). Connect Wallet is shown as primary
CTA but not enforced — "Skip wallet for now" saves the collection
without a wallet during testing.

base64url string. Added urlBase64ToUint8Array converter and also reuse
existing subscriptions when available to avoid duplicate registrations.

commit.message:
fix: anchor scheduler picks up OcrJobs, BundleJobs, and TrustSeals

- Query pending OcrJobs (hashValue set, anchorTxHash null, completed)
- Query pending BundleJobs (bundleHash set, anchorTxHash null, completed)
- Query pending TrustSeals (rawHash set, anchorTxHash null)
- Include all hashes in the Merkle root alongside AuditLog hashes
- Update anchorTxHash and anchoredAt on all tables after confirmation
- Rollback anchorTxHash on all tables if TX fails on chain
- TrustSeal status transitions: issued → anchoring → anchored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: restructure and humanise documentation (#31)

## Summary

- **Diataxis restructuring**: applied framework across all pages —
installation trimmed to essentials (uv-first), quickstart
troubleshooting section removed and replaced with a link to the
error-handling how-to, avro-serializer user guide slimmed to a lean
reference with cross-links, wire-format and migration guide trimmed of
duplicated explanations
- **Deserializer consolidation**: merged duplicate `deserialization.md`
and `deserializer.md` orphan files into a single
`avro-deserializer.en.md` with consistent naming convention; old files
deleted
- **Humaniser pass**: removed AI writing patterns throughout — em
dashes, significance inflation, rule-of-three openers, inline bold
headers, Title Case headings, copula avoidance; applied to both English
and French pages

## Test plan

- [x] `uv run --group docs mkdocs build --strict` passes with zero
errors
- [ ] Review rendered docs for any broken cross-links or formatting
regressions
- [ ] Spot-check French pages for translation consistency after edits
